title: Contact | Lee Dillon MP
meta_description: Details of how to get in touch with Lee Dillon, MP for Newbury.
headings: h2: Contact Lee Dillon, MP Please include your full name and address. I can only assist residents in the Newbury constituency. Check if I am your MP at www.theyworkforyou.com/mp
text_excerpt: --> Contact | Lee Dillon MP top of page Lee Dillon, MP for Newbury Newsletter sign up About Lee Latest from Lee Priorities Cost-of-Living Crisis Education & SEND Housing NHS Rural Economy Sewage & Flooding In Parliament Campaign & Policy Responses Links & Resources Events Contact More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Contact Contact Lee Dillon, MP Please include your full name and address. I can only assist residents in the Newbury constituency. Check if I am your MP at www.theyworkforyou.com/mp First Name Last Name Email Address Postcode Message I want to subscribe to the newsletter. SUBMIT MESSAGE Thanks for your message. Address ​Park Street Offices, Northbrook Court, Park Street, Newbury RG14 1EA Contact lee.dillon.mp@parliament.uk 01635 243510 Press Enquiries bex.bright@parliament.uk lee.dillon.mp@parliament.uk 01635 243510 Promoted by West Berkshire & Newbury Liberal Democrats on behalf of Lee Dillon MP.
